banner.text: Welcome to our Grahapravesham. Your presence will make the day even more special.

event.title: Our Grahapravesham
event.subtitle: Please join us as we begin this new chapter with prayer, warmth, and your blessings.

venue.name: New Home
venue.landmark: Landmark: Near the temple entrance on the east side lane.
venue.parking: Please park along the east side lane and keep the driveway clear for elders and close family arrivals.

rsvp.copy: Please fill in the RSVP form so we can make arrangements for seating and prasadam. Responses stay private in the host sheet.

stream.copy: If you cannot join in person, you can watch the pooja and blessings here on the day of the function.
stream.placeholder: The livestream will appear here once it is ready.

contact.copy: For arrival help, directions, or function-day coordination, reach out directly.
contact.whatsappMessage: Hello, I am reaching out about the Grahapravesham.

calendar.title: Grahapravesham
calendar.details: Please join us for our Grahapravesham celebration.

schedule.title: Ganapathy Pooja
schedule.description: The morning begins with prayers and the first rituals at the entrance.

schedule.title: Grahapravesham Rituals
schedule.description: Main housewarming rituals and blessings with close family and guests.

schedule.title: Breakfast & Visit
schedule.description: Guests can walk through the home, spend time together, and enjoy breakfast.

notes: Please arrive 10 to 15 minutes early if you want to join the opening pooja.
Footwear can be left near the entrance.
If you are delayed, use the contact buttons above for quick directions.
